lifecycle_rows.failure_boundary: invalid KDF metadata rejects; no TPM/PCR key release
lifecycle_rows.name: mount-key
lifecycle_rows.protector: OpenSSL scrypt for new roots; PBKDF2 legacy compatibility only
lifecycle_rows.rotation: cleared on runtime cleanup and rederived on mount
lifecycle_rows.storage: process memory g_master_key; .pqc_kdf stores KDF metadata

lifecycle_rows.failure_boundary: missing or tampered xattr rejects authenticated open
lifecycle_rows.name: per-file-envelope-secret
lifecycle_rows.protector: HMAC-SHA256 metadata check and mount-key/file-id wrapping
lifecycle_rows.recovery: xattr unwrap under the current mount key and file id
lifecycle_rows.rotation: explicit rekey worker refresh when configured

lifecycle_rows.name: aes-gcm-data-block-key
lifecycle_rows.producer: fd-context per-file secret loaded from keyring metadata
lifecycle_rows.protector: AES-256-GCM nonce/AAD bound to file id, block, generation, length
lifecycle_rows.recovery: reload per-file envelope secret before decrypting blocks

lifecycle_rows.name: mount-lifetime-kem-keypair
lifecycle_rows.protector: process isolation and explicit cleanup zeroization
lifecycle_rows.recovery: not persisted; remount generates a new keypair

lifecycle_rows.failure_boundary: file backend is replayable; TPM path depends on provisioning
lifecycle_rows.name: committed-prefix-freshness-anchor
lifecycle_rows.producer: committed-prefix root over per-file generation state
lifecycle_rows.protector: prefix-anchor digest and fail-closed load checks
lifecycle_rows.recovery: anchor load compares stored prefix against reconstructed state
lifecycle_rows.storage: file backend or administrator-provisioned TPM NV backend

lifecycle_rows.failure_boundary: must not be used to claim sealed-key or PCR-bound recovery
lifecycle_rows.name: persistent-tpm-pcr-key-release-policy
lifecycle_rows.producer: not implemented in the mounted production path
lifecycle_rows.protector: none; persistent PCR-bound key release is a non-claim

non_claims: no hardware-backed credential release path for the mount key
no persistent epoch anti-rollback journal in the mounted path
no recovery after a lost mount credential
scope: Key-management lifecycle closeout for the mounted prototype. It covers the password-derived mount key, scrypt/PBKDF2 boundary, per-file envelope secret, AES-GCM data-block key, mount-lifetime ML-KEM keypair, freshness anchor material, TPM NV/PCR policy status, open-file rekey, recovery, rotation boundary, and failure modes. It does not claim hardware-backed credential release, deployed credential rotation, persistent PCR-bound key release, transactional rewrap recovery, or credential-only rollback resistance.
